note: Created SocketAsyncApiTests.cs with 23 tests covering: ConnectAsync success, ConnectAsync/AcceptAsync cancellation, SendAsync/ReceiveAsync round-trip data with fill byte, pre-canceled token behavior for all methods, concurrent send/receive on same socket, multi-socket concurrency, SynchronizationContext verification (custom TrackingSynchronizationContext), synchronous completion checks, thread-ID preservation, ValueTask single-await enforcement, SocketIoValueTaskSource version advancement, stale version rejection, and ObjectDisposedException for all 4 async methods on disposed sockets. All 23 tests pass.
